description_long: This is a rectangular filing cabinet with a dark wood or laminate finish, featuring three vertically stacked drawers on one side and a pair of plain, light-colored doors on the other. The front side of the cabinet displays three drawers, each equipped with a small, round knob and a visible keyhole, suggesting secure storage. The sides and top are finished in a dark, wood-like material, giving the cabinet a modern and professional appearance. The back and sides are plain, with no visible handles or openings, and the cabinet sits flush to the ground. The construction appears sturdy, likely designed to support moderate weight on its flat top surface. This cabinet is suitable for organizing documents or office supplies in a professional or urban environment.
description: A dark wood-finished filing cabinet with three lockable drawers and a pair of plain, light-colored doors, designed for secure office storage.
description_view_0: The cabinet is seen from the side with two plain, light-colored doors framed by a dark border, with no visible handles or locks.
description_view_1: This view shows a plain, dark-finished side panel with two small metallic fasteners at the top corners.
description_view_2: The front view reveals three drawers, each with a round knob and a keyhole, set in a dark wood finish.
description_view_3: Another plain, dark-finished side panel, identical to the opposite side, with no visible features.
